CVE-2019-7282.title: In NetKit through 0.17, rcp.c in the rcp client allows remote rsh ...
CVE-2019-7282.description: In NetKit through 0.17, rcp.c in the rcp client allows remote rsh servers to bypass intended access restrictions via the filename of . or an empty filename. The impact is modifying the permissions of the target directory on the client side. This is similar to CVE-2018-20685.

CVE-2019-7283.title: An issue was discovered in rcp in NetKit through 0.17. For an rcp ...
CVE-2019-7283.description: An issue was discovered in rcp in NetKit through 0.17. For an rcp operation, the server chooses which files/directories are sent to the client. However, the rcp client only performs cursory validation of the object name returned. A malicious rsh server (or Man-in-The-Middle attacker) can overwrite arbitrary files in a directory on the rcp client machine. This is similar to CVE-2019-6111.
